title: 02383_Bidirectional_Adaptation_for_Robust_Semi-Supervised_Learning_with_Inconsistent_Data_Distributions
positive_examples: The proposed Bidirectional Adaptation framework enhances the performance of semi-supervised learning (SSL) algorithms, which can lead to better outcomes in various applications such as image classification, object detection, and text classification.
The framework aims to effectively utilize unlabeled data from inconsistent distributions, thereby expanding the scope and value of SSL in real-world applications.
